scripts.build: node scripts/apply-freehand-move-patch.mjs && node scripts/apply-ai-overlay-patch.mjs && node scripts/apply-ai-overlay-scan-fix.mjs && node scripts/apply-ai-compare-panel-patch.mjs && node scripts/apply-ai-compare-style-patch.mjs && vite build
scripts.deploy: npm run build && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name spine-annotator
